feat.name: Vengeful Strike
feat.requirement: You’re under the effect of Come and Get Me.
feat.text: When struck by an enemy, you respond in turn. Make a melee Strike against the triggering creature. If the triggering attack was a critical success, you can use Vengeful Strike as a free action instead of a reaction.

traits.name: Barbarian
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the barbarian class.

traits.name: Rage
traits.text: You must be raging to use abilities with the rage trait, and they end automatically when you stop raging.

feat.trigger: A creature within your reach succeeds at an attack against you.
